item.ptxt: TCM stores reference point as the standard point for the slope sensor. Since the reference point is lost or misaligned when one of the following tasks is performed, be sure to calibrate the slope sensor:
When the slope sensor is replaced.
When the slope sensor is removed / installed.
When the TCM is replaced with a new one, and “P1708: slope sensor not learned” is detected.

s1.ptxt: Adjust air pressure of all tires to specified value.
When ignition is OFF, connect SUZUKI scan tool to DLC.
Perform DTC Check and confirm that DTC other than P1708 is not detected. If DTC other than P1708 is detected, perform troubleshooting for applicable DTC.
Park vehicle on level surface, apply parking brake and stop engine with ignition ON without shaking the vehicle.
Select menu “Slope Sensor Calibration” under “Utility” mode of SUZUKI scan tool and calibrate sensor with ignition ON. Refer to scan tool operator’s manual for further details.
Confirm that ignition is OFF and then disconnect SUZUKI scan tool from DLC.
